entries.text: This is a nurse practitioner, Kim Jeong Ah, from Eminent Hospice.

entries.text: What I'm going to talk about is that I'm talking about experience as a hospice nurse.

entries.text: Today, I'm going to talk about one of the many questions that hospice nurses ask their families.
